name: Chinese Barbecue Pork - Char Siew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 tablespoon hoisin sauce, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 1 teaspoon sesame oil, finely chopped fresh garlic, 4 tablespoons sugar, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Slice the pork into strips that are approximately 1 1/2 inches thick, 5-6 inches long, and 1/2 inch wide.
3. Marinate the pork slices in the sauce mixture for at least 2 hours.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Place the marinated pork slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 25 minutes, then turn the meat over and bake for an additional 25 minutes until cooked through and caramelized.
